description: Canonical record of decommissioned domains, Vercel projects, and apps. Brain reads this for ops decisions and the admin dashboard.

entries.reason: apps.paperworklabs.com was a stub Next.js app intended to host a custom Clerk Account Portal (user settings, billing). Clerk now hosts the Account Portal natively via its hosted pages (accounts.<domain>), making this app redundant. apps/accounts/ directory has 248 LoC, no active users, no meaningful traffic, deploy_target=vercel, conformance score 0.33. Safe to decommission — reclaims a Vercel project slot and simplifies the monorepo.
entries.notes: WS-48 (Phase C Wallet). Script at scripts/decommission/apps-paperworklabs-com.sh. Run after verifying zero traffic in analytics dashboard.
